title: Department Manager Vacancy at PC Jeweller South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at PC Jeweller South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with PC Jeweller South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About PC Jeweller South Asia Partners:
PC Jeweller South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller South Asia Partners!
